reviews.review_description: No servers
Saw a youtuber with mod play this and just decided to get it
I’m YouTuber with 5 subs:(

I got banned just cause I wanted a screenshot like WHATTTT? IF I AM EATING CHIPS AM I GONNA GET BANNED NEXT? WHAT ABOUT LITERALLY BREATHING? WHAT ABOUT IF I DO NOT KNOW HOW TO WALK CORRECTLY DO I GET BANNED FOR THAT TO HOLY BRO THIS GAME IS SO TOXIC DON’T EVEN DOWNLOAD IT UNLESS YOU WANT TO AVENGE ME SO RATE IT 1 STAR CAUSE THIS GAMES COMMUNITY IS ACTUALLY SO TOXIC. WE HEARD A N WORD IN A LOBBY AND WE KNEW WHO IT WAS BUT THEY SAID LET HIM BE LIKE HOLY BRO. JESUS CHRIST RATE THE GAME 1 STAR AND NEVER PLAY IT AGAIN CAUSE IF YOU DO YOU MIGHT GET BANNED EXACTLY HOW I DID OR THEY JUST HATE ME JUST CAUSE MY COLOR CODE WAS 000.

1. Don't ask for mod or yt (might be blacklisted if you ask)

2. Don't make rude stuff about the game 

3.  Don't beg for updates to come out 

4. Follow the rules inside the game and reviews

5. If you find a bug use the 🐛 if you do

(More things and rules coming)

reviews.review_title: Hey can I be a mod please 🙁🤨🧐
reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this game for 19 years and I was wondering if I can be a moderator I will do my job correctly I will follow all the rules I would appreciate it thank you bye🙂
Owner very nice to me and gave me mod.
Can I be mod pls
Bangerrrrrrrrrrrrrre
So I was trying to ask if I had a chance for mod bcuz I got banned and I got banned for it? WTF
I’m a YouTuber with 183 subs so yeah my name is sharkvr

This game is really good, it has some cool maps, but there’s some issues with the game. 1st issue: there are not a lot of maps. 2nd issue: The way that you get kicked from the entire game when you lose parkour and horror, is a bit crazy and over the top. Overall great game, I make sure to follow all the rules and make sure the game is loyal to its owner and the games rules (: also pls give me mod. 4.2 stars

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, I'll try to improve the game to make it more fun to play, also, don't ask for mod!

reviews.review_description: Your game is very fun I literally play it everyday and I’m going to start vids of this game. But I’m just asking if I can get mod please and thank you, Vaze

W game owner is a really cool guy good humor and the staff are amazing really fun game also follow these rules 


No mod ask/yt


No toxic 


No racism/homophobia 



Great game

One of the mods banned me for no reason and when I got banned it was on the day I got the game and it was perm ban 😡🤬😔
 
(It is a really good game though)
Its so much fun to play horror and zero gravity I spent 3 hours in zero gravity with my friend. the only problem is I cant find the discord server. Other than that 10/10 game

developer_response.body: Hi! I love hearing you like the game, here's the discord if you couldn't find it: https://discord.gg/QeevAGh56J
